explanation.stringValue: '正好' can be used as an adjective to mean 'just right', or as an adverb to mean 'it is the right time or opportunity to do something'.

formal_example.stringValue: 我们下午要去踢足球, 正好一起去吧。

formal_pinyin.stringValue: Wǒmen xiàwǔ yào qù tī zúqiú, zhènghǎo yīqǐ qù ba.

formal_translation.stringValue: We're going to play football this afternoon, let's go together.

colloquial_pattern.stringValue: 赶得早不如赶得巧 / 凑巧

colloquial_version.stringValue: 咱下午去踢球, 你来得正好, 凑巧一块儿呗。

colloquial_pinyin.stringValue: Zán xiàwǔ qù tīqiú, nǐ láide zhènghǎo, còuqiǎo yīkuàir bei.

colloquial_translation.stringValue: We're playing ball this afternoon. You came at just the right time, let's just go together.

nuance.stringValue: Using '凑巧' (coincidentally) or ending with '呗' makes it sound more casual and friendly among peers.

explanation.stringValue: '差不多' can be used as an adjective to mean 'approximate' or 'without much difference'. It can also be used as an adverb to indicate being close in terms of degree, scope, time, distance, or quantity.

formal_example.stringValue: 班里同学你联系得怎么样了？来多少人？差不多一半儿吧。

formal_pinyin.stringValue: Bānlǐ tóngxué nǐ liánxì de zěnmeyàng le? Lái duōshǎo rén? Chàbuduō yībànr ba.

formal_translation.stringValue: How's the contact with the classmates going? How many are coming? About half, I guess.

colloquial_pattern.stringValue: 大差不差 (dà chā bù chā) / 基本上 (jīběn shàng)

colloquial_version.stringValue: 班里人联系得大差不差了，基本上能来一半儿。

colloquial_pinyin.stringValue: Bānlǐ rén liánxì de dà chā bù chā le, jīběn shàng néng lái yībànr.

colloquial_translation.stringValue: The classmates are mostly contacted, basically about half can come.

nuance.stringValue: '大差不差' is a more northern, idiomatic way to say 'almost there' or 'pretty much' in a colloquial setting.

explanation.stringValue: Both mean 'almost', but '差不多' is more common in spoken Chinese and can be an adjective or precede numbers. '几乎' is more formal and often used for undesirable things that almost happened.

formal_example.stringValue: 他汉语说得很好, 几乎跟中国人一样 / 我几乎忘了告诉你了。

formal_pinyin.stringValue: Tā hànyǔ shuō de hěn hǎo, jīhū gēn Zhōngguórén yīyàng / Wǒ jīhū wàngle gàosù nǐ le.

formal_translation.stringValue: He speaks Chinese so well, he's almost like a native / I almost forgot to tell you.

colloquial_version.stringValue: 哎呀，我差一点儿就忘了跟你说这事儿了。

colloquial_pinyin.stringValue: Āiyā, wǒ chà yīdiǎnr jiù wàngle gēn nǐ shuō zhè shìr le.

colloquial_translation.stringValue: Oops, I almost forgot to tell you about this matter.

nuance.stringValue: In daily speech, '差一点儿' is much more frequently used than '几乎' to describe a close call or something that almost happened but didn't.

explanation.stringValue: '尽管' is a conjunction used to state a fact in the first clause, followed by a transition word like '但是', '可是', '却', or '还是' in the second clause to show a result that wouldn't normally happen.

formal_example.stringValue: 尽管已经毕业这么多年，我们还是经常联系的。

formal_pinyin.stringValue: Jǐnguǎn yǐjīng bìyè zhème duō nián, wǒmen háishì jīngcháng liánxì de.

formal_translation.stringValue: Although we have been graduated for many years, we still keep in regular contact.

colloquial_version.stringValue: 虽说毕业好久了，咱俩这关系还是杠杠的，经常聚聚。

colloquial_pinyin.stringValue: Suīshuō bìyè hǎojiǔ le, zán liǎ zhè guānxì háishì gànggàng de, jīngcháng jùju.

colloquial_translation.stringValue: Even though we graduated ages ago, our relationship is still solid; we get together often.

nuance.stringValue: '虽说' is a very common oral substitute for '尽管' or '虽然'. Adding '杠杠的' (slang for excellent/solid) makes the sentence sound like a real conversation between close friends.

explanation.stringValue: The adverb '却' is used after the subject and before the verb to indicate a transition in meaning, often with a softer tone than '但是'.

formal_example.stringValue: 一个脾气不好的人虽然不一定让人讨厌，但是却很难跟人交朋友。

formal_pinyin.stringValue: Yīgè píqi bù hǎo de rén suīrán bù yīdìng ràng rén tǎoyàn, dànshì què hěn nán gēn rén jiāo péngyǒu.

formal_translation.stringValue: Although a person with a bad temper is not necessarily disliked, it is difficult for them to make friends.

colloquial_version.stringValue: 住对门儿好几年，倒连个招呼都没打过，真是够尴尬的。

colloquial_pinyin.stringValue: Zhù duìménr hǎojǐ nián, dào lián gè zhāohu dōu méi dǎ guò, zhēnshi gòu gāngà de.

colloquial_translation.stringValue: Living across from each other for years, yet not even a greeting was exchanged; it's quite awkward.

nuance.stringValue: In spoken Chinese, '倒' is often used similarly to '却' to express something unexpected or contrary to expectation. Adding '够...的' emphasizes the degree of the situation (awkwardness).

explanation.stringValue: The conjunction '而' is used in compound sentences to connect two clauses. It can represent a coordinate relationship (parallel) or an adversative relationship (contrast/transition).

formal_example.stringValue: 有些人觉得朋友就是能和自己一起快乐的人，而我的理解是：当你遇到困难的时候，真正的朋友会站出来，及时给你帮助。

formal_pinyin.stringValue: Yǒuxiē rén juédé péngyǒu jiùshì néng hé zìjǐ yīqǐ kuàilè de rén, ér wǒ de lǐjiě shì: dāng nǐ yùdào kùnnan de shíhou, zhēnzhèng de péngyǒu huì zhàn chūlái, jíshí gěi nǐ bāngzhù.

formal_translation.stringValue: Some people feel that friends are just people who can be happy with them, but my understanding is: when you encounter difficulties, a true friend will stand up and give you timely help.

colloquial_version.stringValue: 大家都忙着玩手机，而他却在一旁安静地看书。

colloquial_pinyin.stringValue: Dàjiā dōu mángzhe wán shǒujī, ér tā què zài yīpáng ānjìng de kànshū.

colloquial_translation.stringValue: Everyone is busy playing on their phones, while he is quietly reading a book on the side.

nuance.stringValue: '而' is slightly more formal and elegant than '但是' or '可是'. It is often used to create a balanced comparison between two subjects or situations. In daily conversation, it's frequently paired with '却' to strengthen the contrast.

text.stringValue: 来中国快一年了，你适应这儿的生活了吗？

pinyin.stringValue: Lái Zhōngguó kuài yīnián le, nǐ shìyìng zhèr de shēnghuó le ma?

translation.stringValue: Have you got used to the life here after being in China for nearly a year?

text.stringValue: 尽管已经毕业这么多年，我们还是经常联系的。

pinyin.stringValue: Jǐnguǎn yǐjīng bìyè zhème duō nián, wǒmen háishì jīngcháng liánxì de.

translation.stringValue: Although we have been graduated for many years, we still keep in regular contact.

text.stringValue: 真正的朋友会站出来，及时给你帮助。

pinyin.stringValue: Zhēnzhèng de péngyǒu huì zhàn chūlái, jíshí gěi nǐ bāngzhù.

translation.stringValue: A true friend will stand up and give you timely help.

text.stringValue: 每个人都需要朋友，朋友可以丰富我们的生活。

pinyin.stringValue: Měi gèrén dōu xūyào péngyǒu, péngyǒu kěyǐ fēngfù wǒmen de shēnghuó.

translation.stringValue: Everyone needs friends, and friends can enrich our lives.

text.stringValue: 一个脾气不好的人虽然不一定让人讨厌，但是却很难跟人交朋友。

pinyin.stringValue: Yīgè píqi bù hǎo de rén suīrán bù yīdìng ràng rén tǎoyàn, dànshì què hěn nán gēn rén jiāo péngyǒu.

translation.stringValue: Although a person with a bad temper is not necessarily disliked, it is difficult for them to make friends.

title.stringValue: 小夏和马克聊马克的中国朋友 (Xiao Xia and Mark talk about Mark's Chinese friend)

text.stringValue: 来中国快一年了，你适应这儿的生活了吗？

pinyin.stringValue: Lái Zhōngguó kuài yīnián le, nǐ shìyìng zhèr de shēnghuó le ma?

translation.stringValue: You've been in China for almost a year. Have you got used to the life here?

text.stringValue: 开始有点儿不习惯，后来就慢慢适应了，最近我还交了一个中国朋友。

pinyin.stringValue: Kāishǐ yǒudiǎnr bù xíguàn, hòulái jiù mànman shìyìng le, zuìjìn wǒ hái jiāo le yīgè Zhōngguó péngyǒu.

translation.stringValue: At first, I wasn't used to it, but later I gradually adapted. Recently, I also made a Chinese friend.

text.stringValue: 那就好，快给我讲讲你新交的中国朋友。

pinyin.stringValue: Nà jiù hǎo, kuài gěi wǒ jiǎngjiang nǐ xīn jiāo de Zhōngguó péngyǒu.

translation.stringValue: That's good. Tell me about your new Chinese friend.

text.stringValue: 我们是在图书馆认识的。平时我们常常一起看书、逛街、踢足球。有时候他还给我发一些幽默短信。

pinyin.stringValue: Wǒmen shì zài túshūguǎn rènshi de. Píngshí wǒmen chángcháng yīqǐ kànshū, guàngjiē, tī zúqiú. Yǒushíhòu tā hái gěi wǒ fā yīxiē yōumò duǎnxìn.

translation.stringValue: We met in the library. Normally, we often read books, go shopping, and play football together. Sometimes he also sends me some humorous text messages.

text.stringValue: 你的这个朋友真不错！下次介绍我们认识认识，怎么样？

pinyin.stringValue: Nǐ de zhège péngyǒu zhēn bùcuò! Xiàcì jièshào wǒmen rènshi rènshi, zěnmeyàng?

translation.stringValue: This friend of yours is really good! How about introducing us next time?

text.stringValue: 没问题！我们下午要去踢足球，正好一起去吧。

pinyin.stringValue: Méi wèntí! Wǒmen xiàwǔ yào qù tī zúqiú, zhènghǎo yīqǐ qù ba.

translation.stringValue: No problem! We're going to play football this afternoon, let's go together.

meaning.stringValue: adv. just in time, just right

title.stringValue: 小李和小林聊同学聚会的事情 (Xiao Li and Xiao Lin talk about the classmate reunion)

text.stringValue: 星期天同学聚会，你能来吗？

pinyin.stringValue: Xīngqītiān tóngxué jùhuì, nǐ néng lái ma?

translation.stringValue: There's a classmate reunion on Sunday. Can you come?

text.stringValue: 能来。班里同学你联系得怎么样了？来多少人？

pinyin.stringValue: Néng lái. Bānlǐ tóngxué nǐ liánxì de zěnmeyàng le? Lái duōshǎo rén?

translation.stringValue: I can. How's the contacting of the classmates going? How many people are coming?

text.stringValue: 差不多一半儿吧，张远还专门从国外飞回来呢。

pinyin.stringValue: Chàbuduō yībànr ba, Zhāng Yuǎn hái zhuānmén cóng guówài fēi huílái ne.

translation.stringValue: About half, I'd say. Zhang Yuan even specially flew back from abroad.

text.stringValue: 是吗？毕业都快十年了，真想大家啊！对了，今天早上，我在地铁站遇到了王静，她毕业后就去上海工作了，她这次是来旅游的。

pinyin.stringValue: Shì ma? Bìyè dōu kuài shí nián le, zhēn xiǎng dàjiā a! Duìle, jīntiān zǎoshang, wǒ zài dìtiézhàn yùdào le Wáng Jìng, tā bìyè hòu jiù qù Shànghǎi gōngzuò le, tā zhècì shì lái lǚyóu de.

translation.stringValue: Really? It's been almost ten years since graduation, I really miss everyone! By the way, I met Wang Jing at the subway station this morning. She went to work in Shanghai after graduation, and she's here for a trip this time.

text.stringValue: 那太好了！麻烦你跟她联系一下，请 she 一起来参加同学聚会。聚会就在学校门口那个饭店，六点半。别迟到啊！

pinyin.stringValue: Nà tài hǎo le! Máfan nǐ gēn tā liánxì yīxià, qǐng tā yīqǐ lái cānjiā tóngxué jùhuì. Jùhuì jiù zài xuéxiào ménkǒu nàge fàndiàn, liùdiǎn bàn. Bié chídào a!

translation.stringValue: That's great! Could I trouble you to contact her and invite her to join the reunion? The reunion is at the restaurant at the school entrance, at 6:30. Don't be late!

text.stringValue: 放心吧。星期天六点半见！

pinyin.stringValue: Fàngxīn ba. Xīngqītiān liùdiǎn bàn jiàn!

translation.stringValue: Don't worry. See you at 6:30 on Sunday!

meaning.stringValue: Zhang Yuan, name of a person
v./n. to have a party; party, get-together

title.stringValue: 孙月和王静聊她们的朋友 (Sun Yue and Wang Jing talk about their friends)

text.stringValue: 这是什么时候的照片？你真年轻！

pinyin.stringValue: Zhè shì shénme shíhou de zhàopiàn? Nǐ zhēn niánqīng!

translation.stringValue: When was this photo taken? You look so young!

text.stringValue: 这是上大学时的照片。一看到这张照片，我就想起过去那段快乐的日子，好像重新回到了校园。

pinyin.stringValue: Zhè shì shàng dàxué shí de zhàopiàn. Yī kàndào zhè zhāng zhàopiàn, wǒ jiù xiǎngqǐ guòqù nà duàn kuàilè de rìzi, hǎoxiàng chóngxīn huídào le xiàoyuán.

translation.stringValue: This is a photo from my university days. As soon as I see this photo, I think of those happy days in the past, as if I've returned to the campus.

text.stringValue: 旁边这个人一定是你的好朋友吧？你们现在还联系吗？

pinyin.stringValue: Pángbiān zhège rén yīdìng shì nǐ de hǎo péngyǒu ba? Nǐmen xiànzài hái liánxì ma?

translation.stringValue: The person next to you must be your good friend, right? Are you still in contact?

text.stringValue: 当然了，尽管已经毕业这么多年，我们还是经常联系的，每次都有说不完的话。

pinyin.stringValue: Dāngrán le, jǐn'guǎn yǐjīng bìyè zhème duō nián, wǒmen háishì jīngcháng liánxì de, měicì dōu yǒu shuō bù wán de huà.

translation.stringValue: Of course. Although it's been many years since graduation, we are still in regular contact. Every time we talk, we have endless things to say.

text.stringValue: 真羡慕你！我上大学时最好的朋友去了南方工作，我们俩已经好久没联系了。我一会儿就给她打个电话。

pinyin.stringValue: Zhēn xiànmù nǐ! Wǒ shàng dàxué shí zuì hǎo de péngyǒu qù le nánfāng gōngzuò, wǒmen liǎ yǐjīng hǎojiǔ méi liánxì le. Wǒ yīhuìr jù gěi tā dǎ gè diànhuà.

translation.stringValue: I really envy you! My best friend from university went to work in the south, and we haven't been in contact for a long time. I'll give her a call in a bit.

text.stringValue: 对。要知道，能有一个真正的朋友，有一段真正的友谊，是多么不容易！

pinyin.stringValue: Duì. Yào zhīdào, néng yǒu yīgè zhēnzhèng de péngyǒu, yǒu yīduàn zhēnzhèng de yǒuyì, shì duōme bù róngyì!

translation.stringValue: Right. You know, having a true friend and a true friendship is not easy at all!

text.stringValue: 每个人都需要朋友，朋友可以丰富我们的生活。离开朋友，我们的生活一定会非常无聊。那么，怎样才能交到更多的朋友呢？当然，要有好脾气. 一个脾气不好的人虽然不一定让人讨厌，但是却很难跟人交朋友. 因为没有人会喜欢跟一个总是容易生气的人在一起. 我们还要经常跟周围的人交流. 交流能让人们互相了解, 如果有共同的兴趣、爱好或者习惯，就更容易成为朋友了。

pinyin.stringValue: Měi gèrén dōu xūyào péngyǒu, péngyǒu kěyǐ fēngfù wǒmen de shēnghuó. Líkāi péngyǒu, wǒmen de shēnghuó yīdìng huì fēicháng wúliáo. Nàme, zěnyàng cáinéng jiāo dào gèng duō de péngyǒu ne? Dāngrán, yào yǒu hǎo píqi. Yīgè píqi bù hǎo de rén suīrán bù yīdìng ràng rén tǎoyàn, dànshì què hěn nán gēn rén jiāo péngyǒu. Yīnwèi méiyǒu rén huì xǐhuān gēn yīgè zǒngshì róngyì shēngqì de rén zài yīqǐ. Wǒmen hái yào jīngcháng gēn zhōuwéi de rén jiāoliú. Jiāoliú néng ràng rénmen hùxiāng liǎojiě, rúguǒ yǒu gòngtóng de xìngqù, àihào huòzhě xíguàn, jiù gèng róngyì chéngwéi péngyǒu le.

translation.stringValue: Everyone needs friends, and friends can enrich our lives. Without friends, our lives will definitely be very boring. So, how can we make more friends? Of course, you need to have a good temper. Although a person with a bad temper may not necessarily be disliked, it is difficult for them to make friends. This is because no one likes to be with someone who gets angry easily. We should also frequently communicate with the people around us. Communication allows people to understand each other; if there are common interests, hobbies, or habits, it becomes easier to become friends.

title.stringValue: 什么是真正的朋友 (What is a True Friend - Monologue)

text.stringValue: 人的一生可以什么都没有，但不能没有朋友，而且必须要有自己真正的朋友。什么是真正的朋友？不同的人会有不同的理解。有些人觉得朋友就是能和自己一起快乐的人；有些人觉得朋友应该像镜子，能帮自己看到缺点。而我的理解是：当你遇到困难的时候，真正的朋友会站出来，及时给你帮助；当你无聊或者难过的时候，真正的朋友会陪在你身边，想办法让你感到幸福。

pinyin.stringValue: Rén de yīshēng kěyǐ shénme dōu méiyǒu, dàn bùnéng méiyǒu péngyǒu, érqiě bìxū yào yǒu zìjǐ zhēnzhèng de péngyǒu. Shénme shì zhēnzhèng de péngyǒu? Bùtóng de rén huì yǒu bùtóng de lǐjiě. Yǒuxiē rén juédé péngyǒu jiùshì néng hé zìjǐ yīqǐ kuàilè de rén; yǒuxiē rén juédé péngyǒu yīnggāi xiàng jìngzi, néng bāng zìjǐ kàndào quēdiǎn. Ér wǒ de lǐjiě shì: Dāng nǐ yùdào kùnnan de shíhou, zhēnzhèng de péngyǒu huì zhàn chūlái, jíshí gěi nǐ bāngzhù; dāng nǐ wúliáo huòzhě nánguò de shíhou, zhēnzhèng de péngyǒu huì péi zài nǐ shēnbiān, xiǎng bànfǎ ràng nǐ gǎndào xìngfú.

translation.stringValue: A person can have nothing in their life, but they cannot be without friends, and they must have their own true friends. What is a true friend? Different people have different understandings. Some people feel that a friend is someone who can be happy with them; some feel that a friend should be like a mirror, helping them see their shortcomings. But my understanding is: when you encounter difficulties, a true friend will stand up and give you timely help; when you are bored or sad, a true friend will stay by your side and find ways to make you feel happy.

meaning.stringValue: prep. when, just at (a time or place)
